body:
Fixes #140

## Summary
- Historical currency lookup now tries the exact requested date first, then falls back to the latest available prior rate for the same pair.
- Dated conversions still fail before the first known rate, so future rates are not used accidentally.
- Added issue #140 case-study artifacts under `docs/case-studies/issue-140/` and a changelog fragment.

## Reproduction
Input from the issue:

```text
22822 рублей в рупиях на 11 апреля 2026
```

The root failure was reproduced with a minimal missing-weekend-rate case: RUB/INR rates for 2026-04-10 and 2026-04-13, then a conversion requested for 2026-04-11. Before the fix, this returned `No exchange rate available for RUB/INR on 2026-04-11`; after the fix it uses the 2026-04-10 rate and reports that effective date in the calculation steps.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test`
- `node scripts/check-file-size.mjs`

## Case Study
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/README.md`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/issue.json`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/pr-141.json`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/ci-runs.json`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/cbr-xml-api.html`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-140/cbr-xml-daily-2026-04-11.xml`

title: Fix historical currency fallback for missing rate dates
